series_metadata.series_title: Post Program Approval Requests and Notic
series_metadata.series_description: The Board''s rules allow licensees to request approval for continuing professional education that they attend after the completion of the program. These records contain, the post program approval request form, the certificate of attendance and the program

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for at least two years after submission by licensee and after completion of the State Auditors biennial audit is completed the records may then be destroyed., Paper: Wastepaper
